00038 
00039 package java.io;
00040 
00041 /* Written using "Java Class Libraries", 2nd edition, ISBN 0-201-31002-3
00042  * "The Java Language Specification", ISBN 0-201-63451-1
00043  * Status:  Believed complete and correct to 1.3
00044  */
00045 
00059 public class PrintStream extends OutputStream
00060 {
00061     /* Notice the implementation is quite similar to OutputStreamWriter.
00062      * This leads to some minor duplication, because neither inherits
00063      * from the other, and we want to maximize performance. */
00064 
00065     private OutputStream out;
00066 
00070     private String encoding;
00071 
00076     private boolean error_occurred = false;
00077 
00078     // Line separator string.
00079     private static final char[] line_separator
00080         = System.getProperty("line.separator").toCharArray();
00081 
00088     public PrintStream(OutputStream out)
00089     {
00090         this.out = out;
00091         this.encoding = "ISO8859_1";
00092     }
00093 
00098     public void flush()
00099     {
00100         try
00101         {
00102             out.flush();
00103         }
00104         catch (IOException e)
00105         {
00106             setError();
00107         }
00108     }
00109 
00113     public void close()
00114     {
00115         try
00116         {
00117             flush();
00118             out.close();
00119         }
00120         catch (IOException e)
00121         {
00122             setError();
00123         }
00124     }
00125 
00135     public boolean checkError()
00136     {
00137         flush();
00138         return error_occurred;
00139     }
00140 
00145     protected void setError()
00146     {
00147         error_occurred = true;
00148     }
00149 
00157     public void write(int oneByte)
00158     {
00159         try
00160         {
00161             out.write(oneByte & 0xff);
00162         
00163         }
00164         catch (IOException e)
00165         {
00166             setError();
00167         }
00168     }
00169 
00178     public void write(byte[] buffer, int offset, int len)
00179     {
00180         try
00181         {
00182             out.write(buffer, offset, len);
00183         }
00184         catch (IOException e)
00185         {
00186             setError();
00187         }
00188     }
00189 
00197     public void print(boolean bool)
00198     {
00199         print(String.valueOf(bool), false);
00200     }
00201 
00208     public synchronized void print(char ch)
00209     {
00210         print(new char[]{ch}, 0, 1, false);
00211     }
00212 
00219     public void print(int inum)
00220     {
00221         print(String.valueOf(inum), false);
00222     }
00223 
00230     public void print(long lnum)
00231     {
00232         print(String.valueOf(lnum), false);
00233     }
00234 
00241     public void print(float fnum)
00242     {
00243         print(String.valueOf(fnum), false);
00244     }
00245 
00252     public void print(double dnum)
00253     {
00254         print(String.valueOf(dnum), false);
00255     }
00256 
00263     public void print(char[] charArray)
00264     {
00265         print(charArray, 0, charArray.length, false);
00266     }
00267 
00274     public void print(String str)
00275     {
00276         print(str == null ? "null" : str, false);
00277     }
00278 
00286     public void print(Object obj)
00287     {
00288         print(obj == null ? "null" : obj.toString(), false);
00289     }
00290 
00296     public void println()
00297     {
00298         print(line_separator, 0, line_separator.length, false);
00299     }
00300 
00310     public void println(boolean bool)
00311     {
00312         print(String.valueOf(bool), true);
00313     }
00314 
00323     public synchronized void println(char ch)
00324     {
00325         print(new char[]{ch}, 0, 1, true);
00326     }
00327 
00336     public void println(int inum)
00337     {
00338         print(String.valueOf(inum), true);
00339     }
00340 
00349     public void println(long lnum)
00350     {
00351         print(String.valueOf(lnum), true);
00352     }
00353 
00362     public void println(float fnum)
00363     {
00364         print(String.valueOf(fnum), true);
00365     }
00366 
00375     public void println(double dnum)
00376     {
00377         print(String.valueOf(dnum), true);
00378     }
00379 
00388     public void println(char[] charArray)
00389     {
00390         print(charArray, 0, charArray.length, true);
00391     }
00392 
00401     public void println(String str)
00402     {
00403         print(str == null ? "null" : str, true);
00404     }
00405 
00415     public void println(Object obj)
00416     {
00417         print(obj == null ? "null" : obj.toString(), true);
00418     }
00419 
00420     private synchronized void print(String str, boolean println)
00421     {
00422         try
00423         {
00424             writeChars(str, 0, str.length());
00425             
00426             if (println)
00427                 writeChars(line_separator, 0, line_separator.length);
00428         }
00429         catch (IOException e)
00430         {
00431             setError ();
00432         }
00433     }
00434 
00435     private synchronized void print(char[] chars, int pos, int len,
00436         boolean println)
00437     {
00438         try
00439         {
00440             writeChars(chars, pos, len);
00441             
00442             if (println)
00443                 writeChars(line_separator, 0, line_separator.length);
00444             
00445         }
00446         catch (IOException e)
00447         {
00448             setError();
00449         }
00450     }
00451 
00452     private void writeChars(char[] buf, int offset, int count)
00453         throws IOException
00454     {
00455         byte[] bytes = (new String(buf, offset, count)).getBytes(encoding);
00456         out.write(bytes, 0, bytes.length);
00457     }
00458 
00459     private void writeChars(String str, int offset, int count)
00460         throws IOException
00461     {
00462         byte[] bytes = str.substring(offset, offset+count).getBytes(encoding);
00463         out.write(bytes, 0, bytes.length);
00464     }
00465 } // class PrintStream
00466
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:24 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
